home.layout.description.message: Sentinel evaluates every user, every device, every connection — continuously. Access is not a door. It is a conversation that never ends.
home.layout.description.description: Front page layout description (meta description for SEO)

home.hero.eyebrow.description: Front page hero eyebrow above the heading

home.hero.tagline.message: Sentinel evaluates every user, every device, every connection — continuously. Access is not a door. It is a conversation that never ends.
home.hero.tagline.description: Front page hero tagline beneath the heading

home.hero.ctaLabel.description: Front page hero primary call-to-action button label

home.hero.secondaryCtaLabel.description: Front page hero secondary call-to-action button label

home.features.watchtower.title.description: Front page Features card title for Watchtower

home.features.watchtower.description.message: Continuous posture assessment. Evaluates device health, location, and behavior every 90 seconds. The moment conditions change, Watchtower knows.
home.features.watchtower.description.description: Front page Features card description for Watchtower

home.features.drawbridge.title.description: Front page Features card title for Drawbridge

home.features.drawbridge.description.message: Adaptive access gateway. Grants, narrows, or revokes access in real time based on context — identity, posture, location, and time. No static rules.
home.features.drawbridge.description.description: Front page Features card description for Drawbridge

home.features.garrison.title.description: Front page Features card title for Garrison

home.features.garrison.description.message: Endpoint compliance engine. Enforces policy on every connected device. Disk encryption, OS version, firewall status — all verified before access is granted.
home.features.garrison.description.description: Front page Features card description for Garrison

home.features.rampart.title.description: Front page Features card title for Rampart

home.features.rampart.description.message: Micro-segmentation layer. Isolates workloads so lateral movement is impossible. Even if one segment is compromised, the breach stops there.
home.features.rampart.description.description: Front page Features card description for Rampart

home.features.spyglass.title.description: Front page Features card title for Spyglass

home.features.spyglass.description.message: Audit and forensics. Full session reconstruction with 7-year immutable log retention. Every access decision, every policy evaluation, every connection — recorded.
home.features.spyglass.description.description: Front page Features card description for Spyglass

home.features.parapet.title.description: Front page Features card title for Parapet

home.features.parapet.description.message: Policy simulation sandbox. Test access rules against real traffic before enforcing them. See who gains access, who loses it, and why — without touching production.
home.features.parapet.description.description: Front page Features card description for Parapet

home.stats.cycle.label.description: Front page Stats label for re-evaluation cycle

home.stats.tunnels.label.description: Front page Stats label for concurrent tunnels

home.stats.retention.label.description: Front page Stats label for audit retention

home.stats.latency.label.description: Front page Stats label for policy latency

home.spotlight.description.message: Define what trust means. Sentinel enforces it continuously.
home.spotlight.description.description: Front page Spotlight description paragraph below the code snippet

home.appMarket.label.message: Monitor your fleet on the go

home.blogPreview.description.message: Threat research, posture advisories, and the philosophy of continuous trust.

showcase.featuresSix.rampart.description.message: Divides infrastructure into isolated zones. Zone crossings require policy evaluation.

showcase.spotlightCode.description.message: Three commands to go from zero to continuous trust evaluation.

showcase.item.spotlightText.title.description: Showcase item title for Spotlight (with text variant)

showcase.spotlightText.description.message: Sentinel evaluates trust continuously. Watchtower computes a posture score every 90 seconds. Drawbridge enforces the result in real time. Spyglass records every decision immutably. The output is always evidence — not assumption.

showcase.item.blogPreviewWithDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (with description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.description.message: Threat research, posture advisories, and the philosophy of continuous trust.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.title.message: The Day We Stopped Trusting the Network

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.descr.message: The perimeter dissolved and the industry pretended it had not. We built Sentinel because every VPN is a trust assumption.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.title.message: Simulating a Breach We Never Had

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.descr.message: How Parapet caught a lateral movement path in staging before it reached production.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.title.message: Why Compliance Is Not Security (But You Still Need Both)

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.descr.message: Passing an audit and being secure are not the same thing. Spyglass bridges the gap.

showcase.item.blogPreviewNoDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (no description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.message: Sentinel 3.4: Parapet Traffic Replay and Rampart Zone Quarantine
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post title

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.message: Parapet now supports full traffic replay against draft policies, and Rampart can automatically quarantine devices that fail posture checks.
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post description

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.description.message: If something brought you here, the link is probably out of date.

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 4 of 5 — CTA label (vacant-address voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.title.message: We could not find what you were looking for.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.description.message: Double-check the URL for typos, or head back to start fresh.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 5 of 5 — CTA label (apologetic voice)

theme.docs.sidebar.expandButtonAriaLabel.description: The ARIA label for the button that expands the doc sidebar

theme.docs.sidebar.collapseButtonAriaLab.description: The ARIA label for the button that collapses the doc sidebar

theme.blog.authorsList.pageTitle.description: The title of the authors page

theme.blog.post.plurals.description: Pluralized label for "{count} posts". Use as much plural forms (separated by "|") as your language support (see https://www.unicode.org/cldr/cldr-aux/charts/34/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html)

theme.blog.tagTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog tag

theme.blog.author.pageTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog author

theme.blog.authorsList.viewAll.description: The label of the link targeting the blog authors page

theme.blog.author.noPosts.message: This author has not written any posts yet.
theme.blog.author.noPosts.description: The text for authors with 0 blog post

theme.common.skipToMainContent.description: The skip to content label used for accessibility, allowing to rapidly navigate to main content with keyboard tab/enter navigation

theme.tags.tagsPageTitle.description: The title of the tag list page

theme.footer.copyright.description: Footer copyright text. The {copyright} placeholder receives the consumer's themeConfig.footer.copyright value as the source-locale fallback; per-locale overrides in i18n code.json usually inline their own text.
